data.title: ICP trades at $5.62, up 3.9% as recovery emerges post altcoin selloff, despite prior AI platform momentum.
data.description: Currently, the price of ICP is trading at $5.62, marking a 3.9% increase in value for the day. This positive movement indicates a potential recovery following a recent decline in the overall altcoin market. Despite the prior momentum driven by the AI platform, ICP is now displaying signs of improvement.

data.title: CAKE price jumps 4.6% to $2.76 with bullish signals. RSI at 65.51 & MACD positive, targeting $2.99 resistance.
data.description: The price of CAKE has surged to $2.76 driven by bullish technical indicators. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 65.51, signaling a strong buying momentum. Additionally, the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) is displaying positive momentum. Traders are now focusing on breaking the $2.99 resistance level.

data.title: ONDO price jumps by 5.12% to $1.04 post ETF filing and Binance.US listing announcement, signaling bullish trend.
data.description: The cryptocurrency ONDO is currently trading at $1.04, reflecting a 5.12% increase over the past 24 hours. This surge follows significant developments, including a major ETF filing and an announcement of listing on Binance.US. Technical indicators suggest a bullish trend in the market for ONDO.

data.title: Ether ETFs attract $453M inflows, led by BlackRock's ETHA with $440M. Total assets now $20.66B after 16 days of gains.
data.description: ETHA, a fund managed by BlackRock, is at the forefront with a staggering $440 million, as the inflow streak for Ether exchange-traded funds (ETFs) reaches 16 consecutive days. This trend has boosted the total net assets to an impressive $20.66 billion.

data.title: ENS price rises by 9.7% to $30.39 with Ethereum ETF support, boosting bullish momentum and overbought RSI at 75.89.
data.description: The ENS is currently trading at $30.39, marking a 9.71% daily increase. This surge is fueled by partnerships with Ethereum ETFs and an increase in domain registrations. The ENS RSI has reached 75.89, indicating overbought levels.

data.title: Filecoin price at $2.64 is up 3.05%, showing mixed signals. Singularity v0.6.0 launch and $15K hackathon boost technical progress.
data.description: The price of FIL is currently at $2.64, showing a 3.05% increase today, while RSI signals remain neutral. Filecoin's technical development has received a boost with the recent Singularity v0.6.0 release and a $15,000 hackathon. These developments are propelling Filecoin's momentum in the market.

data.title: Celestia (TIA) rises 6.16%, trading at $1.93, amidst market fluctuations. Technical breakout contrasts Polychain Capital's $62.5M token sale to Celestia Foundation.
data.description: The Tech Investment Association (TIA) is currently trading at $1.93, marking a daily increase of 6.16%. This surge in price is attributed to bullish technical momentum in the market. However, this positive trend is in contrast with the recent news that Polychain Capital has conducted a $62.5 million token sale to Celestia Foundation. This significant transaction has created some conflicting sentiments among investors and analysts.

data.title: AAVE price surpasses $298 amid $50B TVL milestone, up 4.67%. Mixed signals from technical indicators, RSI at 50.42.
data.description: The cryptocurrency AAVE is currently trading at $298.42, marking a 4.67% increase. This surge comes as AAVE reaches a record total value locked of $50 billion. However, despite this growth, technical indicators are giving mixed signals, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) sitting at a neutral level of 50.42.

data.title: Lido DAO climbs to $1.10 aided by whale buys and Hayes' $1M investment, marking a 5.65% daily increase.
data.description: The Lido DAO is currently trading at a price of $1.10, reflecting a daily gain of 5.65%. This surge in value can be attributed to increased whale activity and a significant $1 million investment by Arthur Hayes. Despite overbought technical signals, the bullish momentum continues to drive up the price of Lido DAO.

data.title: HBAR price surges 13.84% to $0.27, showing bullish momentum in technical analysis despite overbought conditions.
data.description: Hedera's native cryptocurrency, HBAR, is currently trading at $0.27, marking a significant 13.84% increase for the day. This surge has propelled the token above important moving averages, indicating strong bullish momentum according to technical analysis. Despite the relative strength index (RSI) showing overbought conditions, the positive trend continues for HBAR.

data.title: Assembly Biosciences presents data on recurrent genital herpes program, showcasing Phase 1a clinical data on ABI-5366 & ABI-1179 at STI & HIV 2025 World Congress and International Herpesvirus Workshop.
data.description: Recent data from Phase 1a clinical trials for two potential long-acting herpes simplex virus helicase-primase inhibitors, ABI-5366 and ABI-1179, were disclosed. The trials involved healthy participants and showed promising results for both candidates. The presentation highlighted the safety and efficacy of these novel inhibitors in short-term testing.

data.title: PONY AI Inc. gets permit for fully driverless Robotaxi service in Shanghai's Pudong New Area, showcasing growing regulatory trust and advancing commercialization. (wc: 144)
data.description: On July 26, 2025, Pony AI Inc. revealed that it obtained a permit to offer fully driverless commercial Robotaxi services in Shanghai’s Pudong New Area. This permit was granted at the World Artificial Intelligence Conference (“WAIC”) 2025. Pony.ai, a prominent player in autonomous mobility, operates under the Nasdaq symbol PONY. The milestone signifies growing regulatory confidence in the Company’s technology and safety protocols. It marks a significant advancement in the commercialization of Robotaxis in a premier urban market in China, reflecting the Company’s commitment to innovation and excellence in the autonomous vehicle industry.

data.title: Ethereum's popularity spike on social media raises concerns for a possible price drop, says Santiment.
data.description: Santiment warns of a possible price correction for Ether due to its significant increase in social media popularity. This surge in social media dominance raises concerns about the cryptocurrency's stability. Investors should be cautious as Ether's value has reached high levels, leading to speculation about a potential downturn.

data.title: High level of social chatter about Ether could indicate a looming price correction, warns Santiment.
data.description: According to data from Santiment, there has been a significant increase in Ether's social dominance, indicating a possible risk of a price correction. This surge in social dominance suggests that the price of Ether may be vulnerable to a downturn. Investors should be cautious as the current trend could lead to a potential correction in the price of Ether.

data.title: Dogwifhat (WIF) gains 6.14% to $1.07 after testing $1.20 support, signaling potential breakout above resistance.
data.description: After dropping to $1.20 and retesting key support, WIF has seen a recovery in price to $1.07, marking a 6.14% increase. This surge displays bullish momentum, with technical indicators hinting at a potential breakout above resistance levels.
